DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Real Parties in Interest 706 Mission Street Co LLC et al.'s and Respondent's demurrer to the second cause of action within the second amended complaint and petition.

APPEARANCES: Thomas N. Lippe, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS N. LIPPE, APC (415)777-5604 for Plaintiffs The 765 Market Street Residential Owners Association, Friends of Yerba Buena, Paul Sedway, Ron Wornick, Matthew Schoenberg, Joe Fang, and Margaret Collins;
Andrew B. Sabey, Esq. of COX, CASTLE & NICHOLSON LLP (415)262-5103 for Real Party in Interest 706 Mission Street Co LLC;
Franchesca C. Herrera, Esq. of THE MARQUEZ LAW GROUP (415)848-8971 for Real Party in Interest The Mexican Museum;
Robb W. Kapla, Deputy City Attorney, OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY, City & County of San Francisco (415)554-4647 for Respondents City & County of San Francisco, et al.

RULING: Hearing held. Argued and the Court took the demurrer under submission. Parties submitted proposed orders for the Court's consideration. In addition, the Court & parties discussed the briefing schedule for the writ hearing. Opening brief, limited to 30 pages, due 07/24/14; opposition, limited to 30 pages, due 08/22/14; reply, limited to 10 pages, due 09/09/14; hearing set for 10/02/14 at 1:30pm and if necessary, 10/03/14 is reserved for continuation of the hearing. Plaintiff to file a notice of hearing. Parties to prepare and present a stipulation & proposed order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Reporter: Cynthia J. Poliseri of Atkinson Baker, CSR #11448 (415)421-3021/(800)288-3376 (503/TLJ)
